corrections.description: File contains L.D.S. Business College ad but mostly contains Emmeline B. Wells' remarks which should be a separate article
corrections.text:
A SUCCESSFUL COLLEGE GROWS

In one year our increase has been forty per cent.

L. D. S. BUSINESS COLLEGE
SALT LAKE CITY, UTAH

Day Sessions: seven dollars a month
Night Sessions: four dollars a month

notes: Several files are incorrectly categorized as poetry when they contain advertisement content. The L.D.S. Business College file contains mostly Emmeline B. Wells' remarks rather than just the advertisement. Some text appears to be missing from OCR in certain files, particularly magazine titles and bulletin references.
